name: sherpa-eos
description: Sherpa EOS module — stand up and run an owner's EOS in Strety. eos-intake builds the foundation (Rocks, Scorecard, Accountability Chart, V/TO); eos-operator runs the weekly cadence (L10, check-ins, IDS) plus the SMART Rock Audit, quarterly prep, and the Zoom→Strety post-L10 harvest.
